item.title: Vehicle Came in for Misfiring
item.description: A car arrives with engine misfiring issues. Watch how the problem is diagnosed and fixed for smooth, reliable performance.

media:content.media:title: Vehicle Came in for Misfiring
media:content.media:description: A car arrives with engine misfiring issues. Watch how the problem is diagnosed and fixed for smooth, reliable performance.

item.title: Is It Heading to the Junkyard?
item.description: Evaluating a vehicle’s condition to see if it’s worth saving or destined for the junkyard. Insights on repairs, value, and decision-making.

media:content.media:title: Is It Heading to the Junkyard?
media:content.media:description: Evaluating a vehicle’s condition to see if it’s worth saving or destined for the junkyard. Insights on repairs, value, and decision-making.

item.title: Best & Worst 1/2 Ton Gas Trucks
item.description: A look at the top and bottom full-size 1/2 ton gas trucks. Compare reliability, performance, and value to find the best truck for your needs.

media:content.media:title: Best & Worst 1/2 Ton Gas Trucks
media:content.media:description: A look at the top and bottom full-size 1/2 ton gas trucks. Compare reliability, performance, and value to find the best truck for your needs.

item.title: What Part Was Causing It?
item.description: Investigating a vehicle issue to identify the exact part at fault. See how the problem is pinpointed and resolved efficiently.

media:content.media:title: What Part Was Causing It?
media:content.media:description: Investigating a vehicle issue to identify the exact part at fault. See how the problem is pinpointed and resolved efficiently.

item.title: Auction F-Type’s Shocking Repair Bill
item.description: From auction win to costly surprise, see the massive repair bill on this Jaguar F-Type and learn what went wrong and why it added up so quickly.

media:content.media:title: Auction F-Type’s Shocking Repair Bill
media:content.media:description: From auction win to costly surprise, see the massive repair bill on this Jaguar F-Type and learn what went wrong and why it added up so quickly.

item.title: You Can See the Crack!
item.description: A close inspection reveals a visible crack causing major issues, as we diagnose the damage and explain what it means for repairs and safety.

media:content.media:title: You Can See the Crack!
media:content.media:description: A close inspection reveals a visible crack causing major issues, as we diagnose the damage and explain what it means for repairs and safety.

item.title: $100 Oil Change Turns Into $1,200 Repair
item.description: What started as a simple $100 oil change escalates into a $1,200 repair. Watch how unexpected issues and dealership charges turned a routine service into a costly ordeal.

media:content.media:title: $100 Oil Change Turns Into $1,200 Repair
media:content.media:description: What started as a simple $100 oil change escalates into a $1,200 repair. Watch how unexpected issues and dealership charges turned a routine service into a costly ordeal.

item.title: Why Haven’t You Finished My Car?
item.description: A look at the reasons behind car repair delays, from parts shortages to unexpected issues, and why finishing a vehicle isn’t always as simple as it seems.

media:content.media:title: Why Haven’t You Finished My Car?
media:content.media:description: A look at the reasons behind car repair delays, from parts shortages to unexpected issues, and why finishing a vehicle isn’t always as simple as it seems.

item.title: Can the Car Wizard Help This Chevy Owner?
item.description: Watch as the Car Wizard investigates a Chevy Colorado, uncovering issues and providing expert solutions to help the owner avoid costly mistakes.

media:content.media:title: Can the Car Wizard Help This Chevy Owner?
media:content.media:description: Watch as the Car Wizard investigates a Chevy Colorado, uncovering issues and providing expert solutions to help the owner avoid costly mistakes.
